rules.cssText: .policy-template__content { box-sizing: border-box; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-desktop-lg); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-desktop-lg); gap: 0px; aspect-ratio: auto; object-fit: fill; flex-flow: column; height: auto; position: static; }
.footer-links-item-social { gap: 16px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.footer-copyright { gap: 3rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.vertical-divider { background-image: linear-gradient(270deg, rgb(10, 45, 35), rgb(255, 255, 255)); width: 100%; height: 2px; }
.jobs-header__wrapper { gap: 40px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; padding-top: 40px; }
.jobs-card__grid { gap: 16px; flex-flow: column; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1.25fr 1.25fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
.points-content-wrap { margin-left: -5vw; margin-right: -5vw; padding-left: 5vw; padding-right: 5vw; position: relative; overflow: scroll; }
.transparent-icon-spec { width: 40px; min-width: 40px; height: auto; min-height: 40px; padding-top: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; }
.menu { gap: 50px; box-shadow: none; border-radius: 0px; width: 100%; min-width: 100%; height: 100%; padding-left: 30px; padding-right: 30px; overflow: auto; }
.menu-wrapper { flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; width: 100vw; height: 100%; min-height: 100%; padding: 0px; display: none; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; overflow: hidden; }
.footer-signature { row-gap: 6px; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; font-size: 11px; }
.footer-content { padding-top: 70px; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 50px; }
.footer-links { gap: 50px; flex-direction: column; grid-template-columns: 1fr; align-items: stretch; display: flex; }
.search-mobile { color: var(--brand--a); flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; width: 100%; display: flex; }

.search-mobile-overlay { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 8px; justify-content: flex-start; max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%; position: relative; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }
.search-mobile-destination-highlights-list-item-title { align-items: flex-end; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 16px; display: flex; position: absolute; inset: auto auto 0% 0%; }
.search-mobile-overlay-wrapper { z-index: 90; width: 100%; max-width: 100%; height: 100%; max-height: 100%; position: fixed; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }
.filter-form-options { gap: 12px; margin-bottom: -20px; margin-left: -5vw; margin-right: -5vw; padding-bottom: 20px; padding-left: 5vw; padding-right: 15px; overflow: auto; }
.destination-grid { gap: 14px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 100vw; padding-right: 40px; display: flex; overflow: auto; }
.accomodation-grid { gap: 14px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 100vw; padding-right: 40px; display: flex; overflow: auto; }
.accomodation-template-footer { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
.accomodation-template-content-wrapper { border-bottom-right-radius: 0px; border-bottom-left-radius: 0px; flex-direction: column; max-width: 100%; margin-top: 85px; }
.promotion-slider-group.investor-page__topics-slider__group { width: 100vw; margin-left: -6vw; padding-bottom: 25px; padding-left: 6vw; overflow: auto; }
.big-topic { gap: 20px; flex-direction: row; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; height: auto; padding: 16px; }
.big-topic.blue.small { flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; height: auto; }

.big-topic.investor-page__benefits-section__grid__item, .big-topic.investor-page__models-section__item { gap: 30px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; padding: 20px; }
.big-topic.is-small.fidelize { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.big-topic-grid.blog-categories { gap: 12px; width: 100vw; margin-left: -6vw; margin-right: -6vw; padding-left: 6vw; padding-right: 6vw; display: flex; overflow: auto; }
.cashback-section-graph.mobile { width: 100%; max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin-top: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; display: block; }
.about-section-wrapper { gap: 60px; background-image: none; background-repeat: repeat; background-size: auto; padding: 28px; }
.about-section-numbers-item { gap: 8px; text-align: center; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
.home-hero-section.v2 { height: auto; min-height: auto; position: relative; }
.home-hero-section__content { z-index: 25; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: stretch; margin-top: 160px; position: relative; }
.location-highlight-section__wrapper { padding: 45px var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 40px; border-radius: 0px; margin-top: 0px; bottom: 0px; }
.home-promo-section__header { gap: 14px; text-align: left; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.default-header__content.pet-page { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; }
.filter-form-select-list { background-color: rgba(221, 221, 221, 0); margin-top: 0px; display: block; position: relative; }

.filter-form-select-list-source { border-radius: var(--radius--sm); color: var(--neutral-colors--white); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border: 1px rgb(0, 0, 0); max-width: 118px; height: 45px; margin-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 10px; padding-right: 10px; display: block; }
.filter-form-select-list-source.dark.redirect { border-style: solid; border-color: var(--brand--a); background-color: rgba(10, 45, 35, 0); max-width: 100%; }

.filter-form-select-list-source.form-dropdown { background-color: var(--white); color: var(--brand--a); border-style: solid; border-color: rgba(10, 45, 35, 0.4); max-width: none; height: 55px; display: block; }
.hotel-list-promo-section__header { gap: 14px; text-align: left; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 28px; }
.hotel-template__hero-section { gap: 16px; background-color: var(--brand--a); border-radius: 0px; min-height: auto; max-height: none; padding-bottom: 0px; overflow: visible; }
.hotel-template__intro-section { padding: 135px var(--padding--container-full-mobile)35px; gap: 25px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
.hotel-template__anchors-nav__item.fixed.w--current { border-radius: var(--radius--cta); background-color: var(--brand--a); color: var(--brand--f); border-bottom-style: none; }

.hotel-template__location-section { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-bottom: 55px; padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 32px; flex-direction: column-reverse; }
.hotel-template__anchors-nav__fixed-links { gap: 6px; margin-left: -16px; margin-right: -16px; padding: 15px 20px 15px 15px; overflow: auto; }
.hotel-template__location-section__map-wrapper { z-index: 15; order: -1; width: 100%; min-height: auto; max-height: none; display: block; position: relative; }

.hotel-template__gallery-section { border-top-left-radius: var(--radius--md); border-top-right-radius: var(--radius--md); background-color: rgba(207, 204, 191, 0.4); padding-top: 40px; padding-bottom: 45px; }

.hotel-template__gallery-section__header { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 40px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; }
.hotel-template__gallery-section__header__left { gap: 45px; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; max-width: none; }
.hotel-template__gastronomy-section { padding: 40px var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 30px; flex-direction: column-reverse; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; }
.hotel-template__schedule-section { gap: 30px; flex-direction: column; width: 88%; padding-top: 60px; padding-bottom: 120px; }

.hotel-template__schedule-section__list { gap: 12px; background-color: var(--neutral-colors--white); grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; padding: 0px; display: grid; }

.hotel-template__schedule-section__list__item { gap: 11px; border-radius: var(--radius--sm); text-align: center; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 16px 12px; }
.hotel-template__testimonial-section { background-color: var(--background--surface-light); color: var(--brand--c); margin-top: 110px; padding-bottom: 60px; }
.hotel-template__testimonial-section__header__graph.hide-desktop { width: 100vw; max-width: none; margin-top: -170px; margin-left: -7%; margin-right: 0px; }
.hotel-template__testimonial-section__item.mobile-list-item { gap: 30px; border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); flex-flow: column; flex: 0 0 auto; width: 310px; height: auto; display: flex; }
.hotel-template__faq-section { gap: 40px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; width: 88%; padding-top: 50px; padding-bottom: 50px; }

.hotel-template__mobile-header-img { z-index: 15; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 12px; margin-bottom: -110px; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: auto; }
.hotel-template__mobile-header-img__item { border-radius: var(--radius--md); object-fit: cover; flex: 0 0 auto; width: 260px; height: 360px; overflow: hidden; }
.hotel-template__section__mobile-title { color: var(--brand--a); letter-spacing: -0.6px; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 115%; display: block; }
.hotel-template__testimonial-section__mobile-row { gap: 18px; flex-direction: column; margin-bottom: -30px; display: flex; }
.hotel-template__testimonial-section__mobile-row__list { gap: 15px; width: 100vw; margin-left: -7%; padding-bottom: 20px; padding-left: 6%; padding-right: 7%; display: flex; overflow: auto; }
.fixed-hotel-template__mobile-anchors-nav { z-index: 60; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding-bottom: 25px; display: flex; position: fixed; inset: auto auto 0% 0%; }

.hotel-template__mobile-anchors-nav__wrapper { border-radius: var(--radius--sm); background-color: var(--brand--f); align-items: stretch; width: 93%; padding-bottom: 17px; padding-left: 16px; padding-right: 16px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.26) 0px 0px 14px; }
.hotel-template__mobile-anchors-nav__divisor { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); width: 100%; height: 1px; max-height: 1px; padding: 0px; }
.hotel-template__mobile-anchors-nav__footer { gap: 10px; color: var(--brand--a); text-align: center; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; padding-top: 18px; }
.redirect-modal-content { gap: 28px; background-size: 46px; width: 90%; padding-top: 45px; padding-left: 35px; padding-right: 35px; }
.sac-page__guide-section { padding: 30px var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 50px; flex-direction: column-reverse; align-items: stretch; }
.sac-page__guide-section__left { align-items: stretch; max-width: none; padding-top: 0px; position: static; }
.sac-page__sections-wrapper { padding-top: 50px; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 50px; }
.footer-copyright-links-wrapper { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; width: 100%; padding-top: 15px; }

.destination-template__hero-section__content { padding-top: 60px; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 30px; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
.destination-template__options-section__tabs__menu { gap: 5px; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
.destination-card-mobile-link { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }
.destination-list-promo-section__header-copy { gap: 14px; text-align: left; align-items: flex-start; margin-bottom: 28px; }

.destination-template__about-section__video { border-top-right-radius: 0px; border-bottom-left-radius: var(--radius--lg); flex: 0 1 auto; width: 100vw; max-width: none; height: 300px; margin-left: -6vw; position: relative; top: 0px; }
.space-grid { gap: 14px; grid-template-columns: 1fr; width: 100vw; padding-right: 40px; display: flex; overflow: auto; }
.center-list-page__contact { gap: 35px; flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; padding: 35px 30px; }

.center-template__hero-section__content { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-bottom: 40px; padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); flex-direction: column-reverse; position: static; }

.center-template__hero-section__img { background-color: var(--black); border-radius: 0px; width: 100vw; max-width: 100vw; height: 350px; min-height: auto; max-height: none; margin-top: -80px; margin-left: -6vw; margin-right: -6vw; }
.center-template__hero-section__img-mask { background-color: var(--black); opacity: 0.25; width: 100vw; height: 350px; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; }

.center-template__mobile-gallery-section { z-index: 15; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-bottom: 15px; padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 12px; width: 100vw; margin-left: -6vw; display: flex; position: relative; overflow: auto; }
.blog-template__hero-section__content { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); gap: 30px; flex-direction: column-reverse; }

.filter-form-select-list-source-2 { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border: 1px rgb(0, 0, 0); border-radius: 12px; max-width: 118px; height: 45px; margin-bottom: 0px; padding-left: 10px; padding-right: 10px; display: block; }
.cashback-hero-section__wrapper { gap: 25px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; padding-top: 20px; padding-bottom: 40px; }
.cashback-hero-section__info { gap: 11px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.footer-column-imgs { gap: 18px; flex-flow: wrap; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; width: 100%; display: flex; }
.hotel-template__award { border-radius: var(--radius--md); color: rgb(149, 110, 3); max-width: 100%; font-size: 12px; }
.investor-page__hero-section__content { padding-top: 58px; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); align-items: flex-start; }
.investor-page__topics-section { padding-top: 45px; padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); height: auto; }
.investor-page__topics-section__wrapper { flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: stretch; height: auto; }

.investor-page__topics-section__txt-wrapper { gap: 20px; flex-flow: row; width: 100vw; max-width: none; height: auto; margin-left: -6vw; margin-right: -6vw; padding-top: 50px; padding-left: 6vw; padding-right: 6vw; overflow: auto; }
.investor-page__new-section__wrapper { padding-right: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); padding-left: var(--padding--container-full-mobile); flex-flow: column; width: 100%; }
.investor-page__benefits-section__header { gap: 20px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; }
.investor-page__expansion-section__wrapper { gap: 30px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; }
.newsletter-form-grid { gap: 25px; flex-direction: column; grid-template-columns: 1fr; display: flex; }
.newsletter-header { gap: 12px; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: stretch; }
.pet-friendly-pill { flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.pontos-fidelize-title-wrap { gap: 2rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; }
.big-topic-2 { gap: 20px; flex-direction: row; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; height: auto; padding: 16px; }
.title-points { flex-flow: column; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; }
.inline-transparent-wrap { justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-left: 0px; padding-right: 0px; }
.navbar-contact.mobile { z-index: 15; gap: 0rem; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-end; display: flex; position: relative; }
.navbar-contact-item { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); flex: 1 1 0%; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 1rem; }
.indication-section__filters-form { width: 100vw; margin-left: -5vw; margin-right: 0px; padding-left: 5vw; overflow: scroll; }
